The '''''Ravenno''''' was a [[Mesens Corporation]] [[SCT Scout craft|SCT Scout Craft]] in the possession of the [[Loose Cannon pirates|Loose Cannon pirate gang]].

When [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas Azzameen]] arranged to buy a consignment of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to be sold on to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the ''Ravenno'' was the craft assigned to rendezvous with the [[Azzameen family]] at [[Saruwen Station]] and escort them to the cargo transfer point.

However, once the Azzameen [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Gallofree Shipyards Medium Transport]] ''[[Vasudra]]'' had docked with the [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transport]] [[End Run (Xiytiar-class)|''End Run'']], the Loose Cannon pirates sprang a trap designed to capture the Azzameens, presumably for later sale as slaves. Unfortunately for the would-be slavers, the Azzameens were too wily to be caught unawares, and the Loose Cannon gang were driven off.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
